title: AdapterRef
description: Framework-neutral envelope for framework-specific data. Core schemas NEVER inline framework fields; they carry a typed AdapterRef in their sourceAdapter/targetAdapter slots. The `adapterId` selects a concrete adapter schema (e.g. adapters/angular2plus.schema.json), and `data` MUST validate against that schema's payload. This keeps the core framework-neutral while allowing arbitrarily rich framework detail to plug in.

adapterId.description: Stable id of the adapter that owns `data`. Examples: 'angular2plus', 'react', 'vue3', 'svelte'. The harness resolves this to a concrete adapter schema.

adapterVersion.description: SemVer of the adapter schema that `data` was produced against.

data.description: Adapter-specific payload. Opaque to the core; validated against the adapter schema named by adapterId.
